name: Bases CMS

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Migrate settings to Obsidian 1.13 declarative API

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-bases-cms/compare/0.5.8...0.5.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fix XML code-block tag styling and add scroll option for rich preview, addresses #8.

- Prism wraps XML/HTML element names in <span class="token tag">, which collided with Obsidian's `.tag` vault-tag pill styling and made every <Element> render as a chip inside code blocks. Override background/border/padding on `.token.tag` and `.token.attr-name` inside the rich preview so Prism's syntax coloring shows through cleanly.
- Add "Scroll Markdown preview when it overflows" toggle (default off), shown only when "Render preview as Markdown" is on. When enabled, the preview keeps its height clamp but uses overflow:auto so users can scroll within the card; the bottom fade is suppressed in that mode since it would clash with the scrollbar.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-bases-cms/compare/0.5.7...0.5.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Add Markdown rendering for card text previews. Address #8.

Adds opt-in "Render preview as Markdown" toggle in the Text preview settings group (default off). When enabled and a card is falling back to note content because no description property is set, the preview renders via Obsidian's MarkdownRenderer instead of being stripped to plain text.

What renders:
- Paragraphs, headings, lists, blockquotes, callouts
- Inline formatting (bold, italic, highlight, links)
- Fenced code blocks with explicit background/border/padding using Obsidian CSS variables, the language flair in the top-right, and Prism syntax highlighting; hover-only copy/edit chrome is suppressed in the preview context
- Inline code as a small pill
- Dataview blocks via the standard post-processor pipeline

Behavior:
- Description property always renders as plain text, even with the toggle on; rich rendering is reserved for the note-content fallback path
- Read-only - no editor surface
- Height is clamped from the existing "Description max lines" setting
- Soft fade at the clamp, applied only when content actually overflows (ResizeObserver toggles a .has-overflow class so short notes don't get a fade on their own visible content)
- Per-card Markdown Component is unloaded on re-render/close so Dataview and embed child contexts don't leak

Implementation:
- loadFilePreview now returns {text, source: 'property'|'content'|'empty'} so the renderer can tell where a snippet came from; cache and CardData updated accordingly
- Toggling the setting clears the snippet cache so cards re-render in the new mode
- Language flair is injected manually after MarkdownRenderer.render since the editor-side flair extension doesn't run in detached contexts

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-bases-cms/compare/0.5.6...0.5.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

An inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so a CI build and the Obsidian scorecard's
reproducer produce byte-different output and the "build verification"
check fails even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (pnpm build) now ships
`sourcemap: false`, while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap:
"inline"` for local debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic
given the locked dependency tree, so the reproducer matches. Bonus:
smaller shipped main.js, no leaked build paths.

Bump to 0.5.6.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-bases-cms/compare/0.5.5...0.5.6

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Updates
- Clicking the draft status badge now correctly toggles the underscore prefix (renames the file) when "File name underscore prefix as draft indicator" is enabled
- Previously, clicking the badge would incorrectly add a draft property to the frontmatter
- Renamed "Filename" to "File name" in the underscore prefix setting label

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Improved styling on the cards when selected & fixed spacing and padding around card items and scrollbar.
- Added ability to bulk edit list properties (addressing issue #5)
- Truncated longer strings on cards to prevent enormous sizes & Vastly improved truncation controls for text preview, properties, and tags (addressing issue #6)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Addressing issue #4: 
- holding down shift now allows you to select multiple items by clicking anywhere
- larger area for selecting items
- selection persists so returning to that base view will "remember" which items you selected. You can use the "clear" option on the Bases CMS toolbar to unselect all.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Both md and mdx files are now sorted properly via the bases API.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed bug related to race conditions displaying and incorrect number of items in a view.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Bug: fixed inline views in Bases CMS base views

**Problem**: When first adding an inline view (e.g., ![[MediaBase.base#Month-Current]]), it doesn't populate until switching to another note and back.

**Root Cause**: The Bases plugin may not have evaluated the query with the correct this.file context when the view is first created. A single 300ms refresh may be too early or insufficient.
Solution: Implemented a retry mechanism that:
- Always triggers onDataUpdated() — ensures the Bases plugin re-evaluates filters with the current active file context
- Retries up to 8 times with increasing delays (250ms, 350ms, 450ms, etc.) over ~1.5 seconds
- Checks if data is ready but still calls onDataUpdated() each time (it has its own retry logic)
- Stops retrying if the view is removed from the DOM

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Addresses issue #3 - [Bug]: Inline base returns empty in note

- Created embedded view detector utility (src/utils/embedded-view-detector.ts)
- Added isEmbedded property to BasesCMSView class
- Added active file change listeners in main.ts
- Implemented refreshEmbeddedViews() method with debouncing
- Views are automatically marked as embedded during construction

What this fixes: Embedded CMS views (![[base#view]]) now refresh when the active file changes, so dynamic filters using this.file properties update correctly. The fix:
Detects embedded views automatically

- Listens for active file changes
- Refreshes only embedded views (not full panes)
- Uses debouncing to avoid excessive refreshes
- Handles errors gracefully

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Scoped settings container to avoid affecting other plugins.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed flashing issues when rendering MDX files.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Added MDX support.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Remove Dynamic Views references to prevent plugin conflicts

- Replace all --dynamic-views-* CSS variables with --bases-cms-* equivalents
- Update TypeScript files to use new CSS property names
- Remove code comments referencing dynamic-views

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix: Accept external image URLs without file extensions

Allow all external URLs from image properties to be validated by loading,
not just those with image extensions. This fixes thumbnails for Open Graph
URLs and similar image endpoints that don't end in .jpg/.png/etc.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add real-time settings updates and array property support

- Add polling mechanism to detect card size changes and update grid layout in real time
- Add settings polling to detect changes to text preview, image, and property settings
- Clear snippet and image caches when relevant settings change to ensure fresh data
- Support array properties (aliases, tags) in title and text preview by joining with commas
- Fix property groups not updating when settings change by triggering view refresh
- Fixed all es lint errors.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Restricted CSS rules to only affect Bases CMS views.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Included external images in the "Show image embeds" view options.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## Fix blank view issue, Folder Notes interference, and make title always visible

### Major fixes:
- Fix blank view on initial load by refactoring onDataUpdated to await content loading before clearing container
- Fix Folder Notes plugin interference by adding inline styles (display: block, position: relative) to card elements to force layout reflow
- Make title always visible (remove showTitle toggle) and default to file name when no title property is set
- Add truncatePreviewProperty setting to truncate preview property values to 500 characters with ellipsis
- Fix thumbnail and cover image rendering issues
- Improve quick edit icon behavior (always attaches to title element)

### Code quality:
- Remove all console logging statements
- Remove title-related CSS adjustments (card-no-title styles)
- Simplify onDataUpdated flow and error handling
- Clean up code structure and remove redundant logic

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix new note location feature and improve settings independence

- Fix broken "Location for new notes" feature by reading config from view instance dynamically
- Make "Open new notes directly" and "Location for new notes" work independently
- Rename settings: "Customize new button behavior" → "Open new notes directly", "Default location for new notes" → "Location for new notes"
- Only intercept in CMS views (not table/cards views)
- Only auto-open notes when "Open new notes directly" is enabled
- Fix TypeError by making config parameter optional in readCMSSettings
- Restore Style Settings options (fade empty marker, show cover placeholder) with correct defaults
- Fix property label spacing and checkbox centering

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Style Settings integration and property rendering improvements

- Add comprehensive Style Settings configuration for Bases CMS (card layout, covers, properties, badges, dates, checkboxes)
- Organize settings into collapsible groups in Configure View (Card size, Title, Text preview, Image, Date, Draft status, Tags, Properties, Behavior)
- Expand property groups from 4 to 7 with side-by-side toggles and position controls
- Add clickable link rendering for properties (external URLs, wikilinks, markdown links, image file paths)
- Add date include time option with system locale formatting
- Add image position setting for thumbnail format (left/right/top/bottom)
- Update fallbackToEmbeds to support string literal types ('always'|'if-empty'|'never')
- Create style-settings.ts utility for reading CSS variables and body classes
- Remove properties info modal and interceptor (causing issues)
- Set fade empty marker toggle default to enabled (can still be disabled)
- Fix various CSS issues: card padding, border hover colors, view background
- Simplify property rendering logic

NOTE: Hide missing/empty properties still not working - needs further investigation

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add context menu Select/Unselect and Delete options and properties info modal 

- Add Select/Unselect and Delete options to card right-click context menu.
- Remove tap-and-hold selection functionality. Shorten toolbar text to "X selected".
- Reduce toolbar padding/spacing for tighter layout.
- Info modal is shown when clicking the properties button in CMS views explaining how properties work differently.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add tap-and-hold selection for mobile cards

- Implement long press gesture (500ms) on entire card area to toggle selection on mobile devices. Works across all card formats (cover, thumbnail, no-image). 
- Includes haptic feedback and prevents accidental file opening after selection. Checkbox remains clickable as alternative.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add GIF static image toggle and fix image priority/attachment detection

- Add "Force static image for animated GIFs" setting under Appearance
- Fix image priority: property images now always override embed/inline images
- Fix unique attachments deletion to detect images from frontmatter properties
- Improve relative path resolution for image properties (e.g., ./cover.png)
- Add subtle drop shadow to checkbox on cover images for better visibility
- Clear image cache when fallback setting is disabled to prevent stale embed images

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix ResizeObserver error by adding config guard in setupResizeObserver

Prevents "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'get')" error when ResizeObserver callback fires before config is initialized.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Reduced jaggedness in image edges by switching to background-image and adding blur filter - Replace tags with background-image on divs for smoother scaling - Add 0.5px blur filter to smooth jagged edges on thumbnails and covers - Enable high-quality image smoothing in thumbnail generation canvas - Remove batch image loading code (no longer needed with background-image)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Performance improvement when opening the base in CMS view.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Refactored plugin to be more compliant with agents.md file's requirements. 
Extended functionality for quick edit icon (support for file rename) and gave setting to allow user's to force-open related note for unsupported commands (off by default). 
Fixed card sizing/scaling issue triggered by refactor.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Replace custom checkboxes and tags with native Obsidian styling

- Use native HTML checkboxes for boolean properties instead of custom styled inputs
- Apply native Obsidian tag CSS variables to card tags for consistent accent color
- Remove custom checkbox and tag styling in favor of native Obsidian defaults

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Slight adjustment in CMS toolbar spacing.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: You can now customize the quick edit icon.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Third refactor based on Obsidian bot's feedback. Remaining issues should be false positives.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Refactor pass 2 based on Obsidian bot feedback.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Huge refactor based on Obsidian bot feedback.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Major refactor, huge performance boost.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Made some fixes for mobile.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix draft status badge display and bulk operations

- Fix badge not showing on initial load for cover format when using filename prefix mode
- Preserve badge when async embed images replace placeholder
- Make bulk publish/draft operations respect filename prefix setting
- Make bulk operations respect reverse logic setting for draft status
- Update CSS to ensure badge visibility with forced display styles

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Improve draft status handling and UI refinements

- Change default property values (title, date, image, draft, description) to empty strings instead of pre-populated values
- Fix quick edit icon positioning (right: 18px) and adjust title padding to prevent text overlap
- Fix description text fallback logic to consistently show content when property unavailable
- Add draft status badge display logic that works even when property field is empty
- Add "Filename underscore prefix as draft indicator" toggle for formula-based draft detection
- Fix file renaming logic for draft status (proper extension handling)
- Add per-view "Hide quick edit icon" toggle option
- Only refresh view when property changes actually occur (performance improvement)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix view switch detection and toolbar visibility

- Implement MutationObserver to detect card removal when switching views
- Add base identifier tracking to clear selection when switching between different CMS bases
- Fix toolbar not hiding when switching views or when selection becomes empty
- Swap Draft/Publish button order in toolbar and settings
- Make command picker buttons neutral color (remove accent styling)
- Remove command ID from command picker modal (show only command name)
- Clarify delete parent folder setting description
- Enable TypeScript strict mode

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add quick edit feature and customizable toolbar buttons

- Add quick edit feature: pencil icon on card titles to execute commands without opening files
- Add command picker modal for selecting quick edit commands
- Add toolbar button visibility toggles (all buttons configurable, on by default)
- Implement dynamic toolbar refresh when settings change
- Improve new note location handling to respect Obsidian settings
- Add view tracking for real-time toolbar updates
- Update README with quick edit documentation for plugin authors

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Improve bulk toolbar UX and fix cover image rendering

- Add responsive toolbar collapsing (icons-only at <680px width)
- Shorten button labels (Draft, Publish, Tags, Set, Remove, Clear)
- Fix toolbar persistence when switching view types on same tab
- Preserve selection when switching tabs (previously cleared)
- Fix cover image corner bleeding by extending image to cover card borders
- Fix description text preview not appearing initially in cover format
- Replicate Dynamic Views' cover image rendering approach
- Add view type change detection to auto-clear selection appropriately

User can now specify how many tags to show when enabled on cards in the current view.

releases.author: davidvkimball
